title: So evangelionca died where can I get
display_title: So evangelionca died where can I get
wikitext:
[]: So, evangelion.ca died, where can I get...             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sun Aug 07, 2005 3:18 pm the full text about the new info on Evangelion 2 game? I've seen excerpts on AN, but it wasn't complete, it missed the angels part. Anybody saved that? I've looked on gamefaqs but it's not there. And, what happened to the site? It was pretty good.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 09, 2005 10:33 am Four chances: 1) Everybody put me on ignore 2) Nobody has a transcription of evangelion.ca's Eva2 article 3) Nobody knows what happened to the site 4) Nobody knows what I'm talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Aug 09, 2005 10:46 am AchtungAffen wrote: Four chances: 1) Everybody put me on ignore

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 09, 2005 12:05 pm Have you tried the Wayback Machine at http://www.archive.org/ ? That has an unreasonable amount of the web's past history available for browsing.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 09, 2005 12:52 pm No, I hadn't. But that's a hell of a good resource. You just taught me how to fish. Danke schÃ¶n! But, I'm stuck here: http://web.archive.org/web/20041013040433/www.evangelion.ca/gameva2.html I hate when sites do the java popup thingie so you can't get the url's right. I've tried looking in the source code, and it said "games/eva2hacks.html" which I try to add to the url, but no way. Any ideas? EDIT: Did a search on the whole site archive, but t'seems this page is not there...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 09, 2005 1:24 pm I guess that with the page you're after hidden behind a javascript link, the archiver spider wasn't able to get to that page. Bummer!
